metadata.name: Mobile App Not Syncing with Vehicle

description: A customer reports that their mobile app is not updating with the latest vehicle data (e.g., fuel level, location).

nodes.task_description: Instruct the customer to log out of the app and log back in, as this often resolves syncing issues.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a basic troubleshooting step.

nodes.task_description: If the issue persists, check the status of the vehicle's telematics unit from the backend.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pings the telematics unit and sees it is online and responsive.

nodes.task_description: Send a 'refresh' command to the vehicle's telematics unit to force it to sync with the server.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the refresh command, and the customer confirms the app is now showing correct data.
